nodes.name: Schedule - LinkedIn Engagement
nodes.notes: Runs twice daily for human-paced LinkedIn stages (view → connect → message).

nodes.name: Workflow Config

assignments.name: serperQueries
assignments.value: =["AI SaaS company site:linkedin.com/company","B2B SaaS startup founder site:linkedin.com/in","recruitment agency workflow automation","agency scaling operations team","workflow-heavy SaaS company careers"]

nodes.notes: Env: GEMINI_API_KEY, SERPER_API_KEY, FIRECRAWL_API_KEY, COGNIX_LEADS_SHEET_ID. Optional: APIFY_API_TOKEN, COGNIX_PLAYWRIGHT_WEBHOOK_URL, COGNIX_ERROR_WEBHOOK_URL. No email vars.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ q: $json.searchQuery, num: 10, page: $json.page || 1, gl: "us", hl: "en" }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ queries: $json.company_name + " official website", maxPagesPerQuery: 1, resultsPerPage: 3 }) }}

parameters.jsCode: return { json: { ...$json, apify_enriched: false } };
return { json: $json };

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ url: $("Attach Lead Context").first().json.website, formats: ["markdown"], onlyMainContent: true, timeout: 60000 }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ q: $json.company_name + " site:linkedin.com/company OR site:linkedin.com/in founder CEO", num: 8 }) }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { batch_continue: true } }];
return [{ json: { loop: true } }];
return [{ json: { ...$('Build Dedup Index').first().json, triggerLinkedIn: true } }];

nodes.name: IF Playwright Webhook Enabled
nodes.notes: POST to external Playwright runner when COGNIX_PLAYWRIGHT_WEBHOOK_URL is set.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  action: "view_profile",
  lead_id: $json.lead_id,
  founder_name: $json.founder_name,
  founder_linkedin_url: $json.founder_linkedin_url,
  linkedin_company_url: $json.linkedin_company_url,
  connection_note: $json.connection_note || "",
  relationship_message: $json.relationship_message || "",
  profile_view_context: $json.profile_view_context || "",
  company_name: $json.company_name,
  callback_secret: $env.COGNIX_PLAYWRIGHT_CALLBACK_SECRET || ""
}) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({
  action: "connection_request",
  lead_id: $json.lead_id,
  founder_name: $json.founder_name,
  founder_linkedin_url: $json.founder_linkedin_url,
  linkedin_company_url: $json.linkedin_company_url,
  connection_note: $json.connection_note || "",
  relationship_message: $json.relationship_message || "",
  profile_view_context: $json.profile_view_context || "",
  company_name: $json.company_name,
  callback_secret: $env.COGNIX_PLAYWRIGHT_CALLBACK_SECRET || ""
}) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({
  action: "relationship_message",
  lead_id: $json.lead_id,
  founder_name: $json.founder_name,
  founder_linkedin_url: $json.founder_linkedin_url,
  linkedin_company_url: $json.linkedin_company_url,
  connection_note: $json.connection_note || "",
  relationship_message: $json.relationship_message || "",
  profile_view_context: $json.profile_view_context || "",
  company_name: $json.company_name,
  callback_secret: $env.COGNIX_PLAYWRIGHT_CALLBACK_SECRET || ""
}) }}

value.notes: ={{ ($json.notes || "") + " | relationship message sent — await manual reply" }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { loop: true } }];

parameters.content:
## CognixAI LinkedIn Relationship (Gemini)

Env: GEMINI_API_KEY, SERPER_API_KEY, FIRECRAWL_API_KEY, COGNIX_LEADS_SHEET_ID
Optional: APIFY_API_TOKEN, COGNIX_PLAYWRIGHT_WEBHOOK_URL, COGNIX_PLAYWRIGHT_CALLBACK_SECRET, COGNIX_ERROR_WEBHOOK_URL

NO EMAIL. Stages: view → wait 2h → connect → wait 2d → message → manual reply
Limits: 40 views/day, 20 connections/day
Triggers: Manual | Discovery Mon/Wed/Fri 06:00 | Engagement 09:00 & 14:00
